dependencies: Reliance on third-party service providers for technology and operations
Dependence on financial market infrastructure including clearing agents, exchanges, clearing houses
Reliance on cloud service providers and internet access providers
Dependence on GSEs (Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac) for mortgage loan guarantees and purchases
risks: Vendor concentration risk in financial services industry
Concentration of third-party service providers creating systemic operational impact
Third-party technology failures and security breaches
Operational failures from third-party business processes
Reliance on external data providers and market infrastructure
Cybersecurity threats from third-party service providers
Supply chain disruptions from geopolitical events and natural disasters
